text.title: continuous-discovery Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for continuous-discovery as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Recruiting fatigue: weekly interviews require a recurring source—without infrastructure the cadence collapses by week 4.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Mitigation: in-app prompt, customer panel, Userinterviews.com, or a scheduled recruiter agent. Recruiting infrastructure is a prerequisite for continuous discovery at scale.

failure-mode.description: Curse-of-knowledge bias persists if the same trio interprets every interview—internal assumptions lock in.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Rotate observers, use Looppanel/Dovetail tagging across team members. Different reviewers catch blind spots.

failure-mode.description: Assumption testing is often skipped because it feels slower than shipping.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without an explicit weekly slot it disappears. Use the scheduled assumption-tester agent and review results in weekly synthesis.

failure-mode.description: AI synthesis hallucinates patterns from small N—LLM declares "insight" from <5 interviews without human cross-tag.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Never let an LLM declare an "insight" from <5 observations across <2 sources. Schema enforcement: reject completions violating N>=5 rule.

failure-mode.description: OSTs rot when not pruned—opportunities accumulate; monthly archival is skipped.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Opportunities accumulate faster than resolved. Require monthly kill list from research-reviewer; without pruning OSTs collapse under weight.

failure-mode.description: Discovery output without delivery linkage becomes a research graveyard.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Every opportunity must trace to either a tested assumption or a deliberate "park" decision. Tie to delivery: reference opp IDs in PR titles and spec.md.

failure-mode.description: LLMs invent "insights" from thin signal without enforcing N>=5 rule in schema.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Reject completions that violate N>=5. Schema enforcement is the only reliable guard—prompt instructions alone are insufficient.

failure-mode.description: Transcription tools mis-attribute speakers; agents conflate interviewer leading questions with user statements.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Strip interviewer turns before synthesis. Only user statements should feed the interview-synthesizer.

failure-mode.description: Models hallucinate competitor changelog entries when scraping fails; competitor-monitor outputs invented features.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require explicit URL + fetched-at timestamp in every competitor-monitor row. No updates without a source.

failure-mode.description: Daily Haiku watchers overwrite the insight log instead of appending atomically.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Use atomic append + lock file, never Write. Concurrent watcher runs without locking corrupt the log and lose audit trail.

failure-mode.description: Bi-weekly synthesizer with full week's context can exceed context window.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Pre-summarize per-day with Haiku, feed summaries to Opus. Full-week raw context overflows and silently truncates.

failure-mode.description: Subagents that write to Dovetail/Notion via API create duplicate notes if retried without idempotency.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require idempotency keys (hash of source URL + date) for all API writes. Retries without idempotency multiply notes.

failure-mode.description: Assumption-tester proposes "ship and measure" as a valid test type.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: That is delivery, not discovery. Constrain to: smoke test, fake door, prototype, Wizard of Oz, concierge, Mom Test, data dive.

failure-mode.description: Long-running cron agents accumulate state drift; schema validation is never run.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Have research-reviewer run monthly schema-validation pass over OST + assumptions register. Prevents entropy.

failure-mode.description: Privacy: raw PII transcripts fed to non-zero-retention models.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Use Anthropic ZDR-eligible endpoints or strip PII pre-prompt. Interview transcripts are sensitive data.

failure-mode.description: Recruitment automation violates panel ToS (Userinterviews limits weekly batch size).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Rate-limit at agent level. Check service ToS and adjust cadence to comply.
